en: "Now this is what you shall do to them to consecrate them, that they may serve me as priests. Take one bull of the herd and two rams without blemish,
zh: “你要把他們分別為聖，使他們作我的祭司，就必須這樣作：取一頭小公牛和兩隻沒有殘疾的公綿羊，

en: and unleavened bread, unleavened cakes mixed with oil, and unleavened wafers smeared with oil. You shall make them of fine wheat flour.
zh: 以及無酵餅、調油的無酵餅和抹油的無酵薄餅。這些你都要用細麥麵來做。

en: You shall put them in one basket and bring them in the basket, and bring the bull and the two rams.
zh: 你要把這些餅放在籃子裡，用籃子把餅帶來獻上，又把小公牛和兩隻綿羊牽來。

en: You shall bring Aaron and his sons to the entrance of the tent of meeting and wash them with water.
zh: 你要把亞倫和他兒子們帶到會幕門口，用水給他們洗身。

en: Then you shall take the garments, and put on Aaron the coat and the robe of the ephod, and the ephod, and the breastpiece, and gird him with the skillfully woven band of the ephod.
zh: 你要拿衣服來，給亞倫穿上雜色內袍、以弗得的長外袍、以弗得和胸牌，又束上巧工織成的以弗得的帶子。

en: And you shall set the turban on his head and put the holy crown on the turban.
zh: 你要把禮冠戴在他頭上，又把聖冠放在禮冠上。

en: You shall take the anointing oil and pour it on his head and anoint him.
zh: 你要把膏油拿來，倒在他頭上，膏立他。

en: Then you shall bring his sons and put coats on them,
zh: 你也要把他的兒子帶來，給他們穿上雜色內袍。

en: and you shall gird Aaron and his sons with sashes and bind caps on them. And the priesthood shall be theirs by a statute forever. Thus you shall ordain Aaron and his sons.
zh: 要給亞倫和他兒子束上腰帶，包上頭巾；這樣，他們就按永遠的定例，得了祭司的職分。你又要把亞倫和他兒子們分別為聖。

en: "Then you shall bring the bull before the tent of meeting. Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the bull.
zh: “你要把公牛帶到會幕來獻上，亞倫和他兒子們要按手在公牛的頭上。

en: Then you shall kill the bull before the LORD at the entrance of the tent of meeting,
zh: 你要在耶和華面前，在會幕門口，宰殺那公牛。

en: and shall take part of the blood of the bull and put it on the horns of the altar with your finger, and the rest of the blood you shall pour out at the base of the altar.
zh: 你要取些公牛的血，用你的指頭抹在祭壇的角上，把其餘的血都倒在祭壇腳前。

en: And you shall take all the fat that covers the entrails, and the long lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them, and burn them on the altar.
zh: 你要把一切遮蓋內臟的脂油、肝葉、兩個腰子和腰子上的脂油，都取出來，把它們焚燒在祭壇上。

en: But the flesh of the bull and its skin and its dung you shall burn with fire outside the camp; it is a sin offering.
zh: 至於公牛的肉、皮和糞，你都要在營外用火焚化。因為這是贖罪祭。

en: "Then you shall take one of the rams, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram,
zh: “你要把一隻公綿羊牽來，亞倫和他兒子們要按手在這公綿羊的頭上。

en: and you shall kill the ram and shall take its blood and throw it against the sides of the altar.
zh: 你要宰殺這公綿羊，取些羊血，灑在祭壇的周圍。

en: Then you shall cut the ram into pieces, and wash its entrails and its legs, and put them with its pieces and its head,
zh: 你要把公綿羊切成塊子，再把內臟和羊腿洗淨，放在肉塊和羊頭上面。

en: and burn the whole ram on the altar. It is a burnt offering to the LORD. It is a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 你要把整隻公綿羊焚燒在祭壇上；這是獻給耶和華的燔祭，是獻給耶和華馨香的火祭。

en: "You shall take the other ram, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram,
zh: “你要把另一隻公綿羊也牽來，亞倫和他兒子們要按手在這公綿羊的頭上。

en: and you shall kill the ram and take part of its blood and put it on the tip of the right ear of Aaron and on the tips of the right ears of his sons, and on the thumbs of their right hands and on the great toes of their right feet, and throw the rest of the blood against the sides of the altar.
zh: 你要宰殺這公綿羊，取些血，抹在亞倫的右耳垂上，以及他兒子們的右耳垂上，又抹在他們右手的大拇指上，和他們右腳的大拇趾上；並且要把血灑在祭壇的周圍。

en: Then you shall take part of the blood that is on the altar, and of the anointing oil, and sprinkle it on Aaron and his garments, and on his sons and his sons' garments with him. He and his garments shall be holy, and his sons and his sons' garments with him.
zh: 你要從壇上取一點血，也取一點膏油，彈在亞倫身上和他的衣服上，並且要彈在他兒子的身上和他們的衣服上。這樣，他和他的衣服，他兒子和他們的衣服就都一同成聖。

en: "You shall also take the fat from the ram and the fat tail and the fat that covers the entrails, and the long lobe of the liver and the two kidneys with the fat that is on them, and the right thigh (for it is a ram of ordination),
zh: 你要從這公綿羊身上取出脂油和肥尾巴，遮蓋內臟的脂油和肝葉、兩個腰子和腰子上的脂油，以及右腿，因為這是授聖職的時候，所要獻的公綿羊，

en: and one loaf of bread and one cake of bread made with oil, and one wafer out of the basket of unleavened bread that is before the LORD.
zh: 你要從擺在耶和華面前載無酵餅的籃子裡取一個圓餅、一個油餅和一個薄餅。

en: You shall put all these on the palms of Aaron and on the palms of his sons, and wave them for a wave offering before the LORD.
zh: 你要把這一切都放在亞倫和他兒子的手上；你要在耶和華面前把他們搖動作搖祭。

en: Then you shall take them from their hands and burn them on the altar on top of the burnt offering, as a pleasing aroma before the LORD. It is a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 你要從他們手中接過來，向著祭壇把這些東西燒在燔祭之上，在耶和華面前作馨香之氣，這是獻給耶和華的火祭。

en: "You shall take the breast of the ram of Aaron's ordination and wave it for a wave offering before the LORD, and it shall be your portion.
zh: “你要取亞倫授聖職的時候，所獻的公綿羊的胸，在耶和華面前把它搖動作搖祭，這就是你的分。

en: And you shall consecrate the breast of the wave offering that is waved and the thigh of the priests' portion that is contributed from the ram of ordination, from what was Aaron's and his sons.
zh: 那作搖祭的胸和舉祭的腿，你都要使它們成聖，就是亞倫和他兒子授聖職的時候，所獻的公綿羊，被搖過被舉過的部分。

en: It shall be for Aaron and his sons as a perpetual due from the people of Israel, for it is a contribution. It shall be a contribution from the people of Israel from their peace offerings, their contribution to the LORD.
zh: 這要作為亞倫和他兒子們從以色列人所得的分，作為永遠的定例，因為這是舉祭。這舉祭要從以色列人的平安祭中分別出來，歸給耶和華作舉祭。

en: "The holy garments of Aaron shall be for his sons after him; they shall be anointed in them and ordained in them.
zh: “亞倫的聖衣要傳給他的子孫，要穿著受膏，也要穿著受聖職。

en: The son who succeeds him as priest, who comes into the tent of meeting to minister in the Holy Place, shall wear them seven days.
zh: 亞倫的子孫中，凡是接替他作祭司的，每逢進入會幕在聖所裡事奉的時候，都要穿聖衣七天。

en: "You shall take the ram of ordination and boil its flesh in a holy place.
zh: “你要把授聖職的時候所獻的公綿羊取來，在聖潔的地方燒牠的肉。

en: And Aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram and the bread that is in the basket in the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 亞倫和他的兒子要在會幕的門口吃這公綿羊的肉和籃子裡的餅。

en: They shall eat those things with which atonement was made at their ordination and consecration, but an outsider shall not eat of them, because they are holy.
zh: 他們要吃那些用來贖罪的東西，好使他們可以接受聖職，可以成聖；只是外人不可吃，因為這些東西是聖物。

en: And if any of the flesh for the ordination or of the bread remain until the morning, then you shall burn the remainder with fire. It shall not be eaten, because it is holy.
zh: 授聖職的時候所獻的肉和餅，如果有一點留到早晨，你要把留下的用火燒了，不可吃，因為這是聖物。

en: "Thus you shall do to Aaron and to his sons, according to all that I have commanded you. Through seven days shall you ordain them,
zh: “這樣，你要照我吩咐你的，向亞倫和他的兒子行接受聖職的禮七天。

en: and every day you shall offer a bull as a sin offering for atonement. Also you shall purify the altar, when you make atonement for it, and shall anoint it to consecrate it.
zh: 你要每天獻公牛一頭作贖罪祭，用來贖罪；你為祭壇行贖罪祭的時候，你要潔淨祭壇。而且你要用膏抹祭壇，使祭壇成聖。

en: Seven days you shall make atonement for the altar and consecrate it, and the altar shall be most holy. Whatever touches the altar shall become holy.
zh: 你要為祭壇行贖罪祭七天，也要使它成聖，這樣，祭壇就成為至聖；一切觸著祭壇的東西，都要成聖。

en: "Now this is what you shall offer on the altar: two lambs a year old day by day regularly.
zh: “這就是你要獻在祭壇的：每天兩隻一歲的羊羔。

en: One lamb you shall offer in the morning, and the other lamb you shall offer at twilight.
zh: 第一隻羊你要在早晨獻上；第二隻在傍晚的時候獻上，

en: And with the first lamb a tenth seah of fine flour mingled with a fourth of a hin of beaten oil, and a fourth of a hin of wine for a drink offering.
zh: 和這一隻羊同獻的，要用一公斤細麵與一公升榨成的油混和，又要用一公升酒作奠祭。

en: The other lamb you shall offer at twilight, and shall offer with it a grain offering and its drink offering, as in the morning, for a pleasing aroma, a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 那另一隻羊你要在傍晚的時候獻上，照著早晨的素祭和它的奠祭一樣辦理，作馨香之氣，作獻給耶和華的火祭。

en: It shall be a regular burnt offering throughout your generations at the entrance of the tent of meeting before the LORD, where I will meet with you, to speak to you there.
zh: 這要作你們世世代代常獻的燔祭，獻在會幕的門口，耶和華的面前，我要在那裡與你們相會，在那裡和你們說話。

en: There I will meet with the people of Israel, and it shall be sanctified by my glory.
zh: 我要在那裡與以色列人相會，會幕就會因我的榮耀被尊為聖。

en: I will consecrate the tent of meeting and the altar. Aaron also and his sons I will consecrate to serve me as priests.
zh: 我要使會幕和祭壇成聖，也要使亞倫和他的兒子成聖，作祭司事奉我。

en: I will dwell among the people of Israel and will be their God.
zh: 我要住在以色列人中間，我也要作他們的 神。

en: And they shall know that I am the LORD their God, who brought them out of the land of Egypt that I might dwell among them. I am the LORD their God.
zh: 他們必知道我是耶和華他們的 神，就是從埃及地把他們領出來的，為要住在他們中間。我是耶和華他們的 神。”
